creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text: on rawtherapee, I am going to pick up the two commits from Rawtherapee's merge request https://github.com/Beep6581/RawTherapee/pull/7080/commits as 5.10_3 so we'll follow upstream code more closely. Code is built, but not yet pushed as I'll be waiting for the rust and rawtherapee poudriere builds to conclude over the next few hours now that 5.10_2 resolved the immediate pain.
